name: Indonesian Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 to 6 skinned and boned chicken breasts
1 cup shelled, roasted, unsalted peanuts, pulverized in a blender or chopper
3 chili peppers or other hot peppers (minimum), minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into small cubes.
2. Saute chicken in oil until cooked. Turn off the heat.
3. In a blender, add garlic and ginger to the water ingredients. Blend until smooth.
4. Put the mixture in a double boiler or a reasonable facsimile of one. Cover and cook until thickened (at least 20 minutes).
5. Slice remaining onion into rings. Saute in the remaining oil until translucent.
6. Make rice.
7. Mix chicken and sauce.
8. Serve over rice. Place onion rings on top. This dish should be spicy. If not, add more peppers the next time.
